mapper.select: SELECT A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.REPORT_CNTN , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_STAT , A.REPORT_STDT , B.BOOK_TITL FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb}

SELECT A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.REPORT_CNTN , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_STAT , A.REPORT_STDT , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_ATHR , B.BOOK_CVIM , B.BOOK_ISBN , B.BOOK_PUBL , B.BOOK_DESC FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb}
